name: galgame-companion (DEV — ArtificKoi)
info: LOCAL DEV build of galgame-companion, for smoke-testing the ArtificKoi (School v3) card. Distinct `id` from the released `galgame-companion.import.json`, so both can sit in the Tavern-Helper script library at once — keep only ONE enabled or the whole companion starts twice. Requires `npm run serve` (dev-server on :5500, sends the CORS headers TH's srcdoc iframe needs) and `npm run build` / `npm run dev` for a fresh dist. Cache-bust by bumping ?v=devN — TH's iframe caches the module URL. Nothing here touches mvu-helper: the ST extension keeps running whatever is deployed, so a companion-only change can be tested in isolation.
